description_long: This object is a compact, boxy SUV with a utilitarian design reminiscent of classic off-road vehicles. It features a flat hood, exposed front fenders, and a prominent front grille, with circular headlights and a visible front bumper. The vehicle has an open cabin with a simple dashboard, upright windshield, and a visible steering wheel. The sides reveal two doors and a rear cargo area, with minimal overhangs and a spare tire mounted at the back. The wheels are solid and robust, suitable for rugged terrain, and the overall silhouette is angular and functional. The exterior appears to be made of metal with a matte finish, and the interior likely includes seats, a steering wheel, and dashboard components.
description: A compact, boxy SUV with a utilitarian, classic off-road design, featuring a flat hood, open cabin, and solid wheels. The exterior is matte and angular, with visible front grille and spare tire at the rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat hood, prominent grille, circular headlights, and front bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cabin, upright windshield, two doors, and solid wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spare tire, rear cargo area, and simple, boxy rear design.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open cabin, two doors, and robust wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: solid disc wheels with no visible spokes or patterns
